name: Chinese Chicken Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spaghetti, broken into 2 to 2-inch pieces
3 to 4 cups cooked chicken, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1 bunch Green onions with tops, sliced
1 medium Cucumber, unpeeled, cut into thin strips
4 ounces Sliced water chestnuts (1/2 of an 8-ounce can)
1 small Red or yellow pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti in a large pot of boiling water according to package directions.
2. Drain the pasta in a colander and rinse under cold running water, separating the strands while rinsing.
3. Drain well and place the spaghetti in a large bowl.
4. Toss with 2 tablespoons of sesame oil.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients for the salad.
6. To make the dressing, whisk all dressing ingredients together in a small bowl.
7. Pour the dressing over the pasta salad and toss well to combine.
8. Cover and refrigerate several hours to allow flavors to blend.
9. Bring the salad to room temperature before serving.
